logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_rack' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_rreq' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_wack' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_wreq' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_dout' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_din' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'mem_addr' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'r_pwm' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'r_dir' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'l_pwm' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'l_dir' will be exposed as RTL port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Global scalar 'dummy_tmr_out' will be exposed as RTL port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'mem_rreq' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'mem_wreq' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'mem_dout' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'mem_addr' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'r_pwm' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'r_dir' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'l_pwm' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'l_dir' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'dummy_tmr_out' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.
WARNING: [XFORM 203-561] 'Loop-2' (motor_ctrl.c:256:3) in function 'motor_ctrl' is an infinite loop.
